title: Microsoft to fund Mistral’s European AI expansion in multibillion-dollar deal
summary: Microsoft gets a credible European model to offer regulated customers wary of American-only stacks, especially after Washington tightened access to some Anthropic models abroad, while Mistral gets the capital and chips to keep pace in a race where compute has become the…
